workflows.name: Authentification (Login)
workflows.trigger: Utilisateur soumet le formulaire de connexion (POST /login)

states.name: form_displayed
states.description: Formulaire de connexion visible, en attente de soumission.

states.name: credentials_validating
states.description: Validation du formulaire et appel a authenticate(email, password).

states.name: authenticated
states.description: Utilisateur connecte, session Django demarree, redirection vers home.

states.name: login_failed
states.description: Credentials incorrects, formulaire re-affiche avec erreur generique.

transitions.condition: authenticate() retourne un user non-None (ref BR-011, BR-012)
authenticate() retourne None — email inconnu ou mot de passe incorrect (ref BR-011)

workflows.mermaid_diagram:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> form_displayed
  form_displayed --> credentials_validating : POST + form_valid
  credentials_validating --> authenticated : authenticate() != None
  authenticated --> [*] : redirect to home
  credentials_validating --> login_failed : authenticate() == None
  login_failed --> form_displayed : re-display form
  form_displayed --> form_displayed : POST + form_invalid

workflows.name: Inscription Utilisateur (Register)

states.name: form_displayed
states.description: Formulaire d'inscription vierge visible.

states.name: creating_user
states.description: Creation du compte en cours dans une transaction.atomic().

states.name: auto_logging_in
states.description: Utilisateur cree, connexion automatique en cours.

states.name: authenticated
states.description: Utilisateur inscrit et connecte, redirection vers home.

states.name: registration_failed
states.description: Erreur d'integrite (email ou username deja pris), formulaire re-affiche.

transitions.condition: POST + RegisterForm.is_valid() — username, email, password fournis (ref BR-013)
IntegrityError — email ou username en doublon (ref BR-013, BR-002)
actions: form.add_error('email', 'This email has already been taken.') | form.add_error('username', 'This username has already been taken.') | form.add_error(None, 'Registration failed.')

rollback_actions: form.add_error('email', 'This email has already been taken.')
form.add_error('username', 'This username has already been taken.')

workflows.mermaid_diagram:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> form_displayed
  form_displayed --> creating_user : POST + form_valid
  creating_user --> auto_logging_in : create_user() success
  auto_logging_in --> authenticated : login() success
  authenticated --> [*] : redirect to home
  creating_user --> registration_failed : IntegrityError
  registration_failed --> form_displayed : re-display with errors
  form_displayed --> form_displayed : POST + form_invalid

workflows.name: Modification des Parametres Utilisateur (Settings)

states.name: form_displayed
states.description: Formulaire pre-rempli avec les donnees actuelles de l'utilisateur (image, username, bio, email).

states.name: saving_settings
states.description: Validation du formulaire, sauvegarde des donnees utilisateur.

states.name: re_authenticating
states.description: Nouveau mot de passe defini — re-login obligatoire pour maintenir la session active.

states.name: settings_saved
states.description: Parametres sauvegardes sans changement de mot de passe.

states.name: redirected_to_profile
states.description: Redirection vers la page de profil de l'utilisateur.

actions: form.save(commit=False) — produit l'objet user non sauvegarde
login(request, user) — re-login pour maintenir la session

transitions.condition: Sauvegarde reussie (sans changement de mot de passe)

workflows.mermaid_diagram:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> form_displayed
  form_displayed --> saving_settings : POST + form_valid
  saving_settings --> re_authenticating : password non vide
  saving_settings --> settings_saved : password vide
  re_authenticating --> redirected_to_profile : login() + redirect
  settings_saved --> redirected_to_profile : redirect to profile
  redirected_to_profile --> [*]
  form_displayed --> form_displayed : POST + form_invalid

workflows.name: Deconnexion (Logout)
workflows.trigger: Utilisateur soumet le formulaire de deconnexion (POST /logout, @require_POST)

states.name: session_active
states.description: Session utilisateur active (authentifie ou anonyme).

states.name: logged_out
states.description: Session detruite, utilisateur redevenu anonyme, redirection vers home.

rollback_actions: Django retourne automatiquement HTTP 405 Method Not Allowed (@require_POST)

workflows.mermaid_diagram:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> session_active
  session_active --> logged_out : POST /logout (BR-016)
  logged_out --> [*] : redirect to home
  note right of session_active : GET /logout → HTTP 405

workflows.name: Toggle Suivi Utilisateur (Follow/Unfollow)
workflows.trigger: Utilisateur authentifie clique sur Follow ou Unfollow (POST /profile/<username>/follow, @login_required @require_POST)

states.name: not_following
states.description: L'utilisateur courant ne suit pas encore le profil cible.

states.name: following
states.description: L'utilisateur courant suit dejà le profil cible.

states.name: follow_toggled
states.description: Etat de suivi inverse, reponse HTMX partielle ou redirect.

transitions.condition: profile_user != request.user ET pas dans followers (ref BR-019, BR-010)
profile_user != request.user ET deja dans followers (ref BR-019, BR-010)
profile_user == request.user (auto-follow interdit — no-op, ref BR-019)

workflows.mermaid_diagram:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> not_following
  [*] --> following
  not_following --> follow_toggled : add follower (is_following=True)
  following --> follow_toggled : remove follower (is_following=False)
  not_following --> follow_toggled : auto-follow attempt (no-op)
  follow_toggled --> [*] : HTMX partial follow_button | redirect to profile

workflows.name: Creation d'Article

states.name: editing_form
states.description: Formulaire de creation d'article vierge visible.

states.name: saving_article
states.description: Formulaire valide, creation de l'objet Article, generation du slug, association des tags, invalidation du cache.
entry_actions: article.title = form.title; article.summary = form.description; article.content = form.body
article.save() → slug = slugify(title) [auto via Article.save() quand pk is None] (ref BR-023)
article.tags.clear() → article.tags.add(tag) pour chaque tag (ref BR-032)

states.name: article_published
states.description: Article cree et publie, redirection vers le detail.

actions: _save_article_form(form, article) : mapping form.description → article.summary, form.body → article.content
slug genere automatiquement via slugify(title) (ref BR-023)

error_handling.condition: Formulaire invalide (titre manquant ou contrainte unique violee)

workflows.mermaid_diagram:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> editing_form
  editing_form --> saving_article : POST + form_valid
  saving_article --> article_published : save() + tags + cache_delete
  article_published --> [*] : redirect to article detail
  editing_form --> editing_form : POST + form_invalid
  note right of saving_article : slug=slugify(title) si pk=None (BR-023)
  note right of saving_article : cache.delete('all_tags') (BR-027)

workflows.name: Edition d'Article
workflows.trigger: Auteur authentifie soumet ArticleForm en edition (POST /article/<slug>/edit, @login_required)

states.name: editing_form
states.description: Formulaire pre-rempli avec les donnees actuelles (title, description=summary, body=content, tags).
entry_actions: ArticleForm(initial={title, description: summary, body: content, tags: comma-separated})

states.name: saving_article
states.description: Formulaire valide, mise a jour des champs, re-calcul des tags, invalidation du cache.
entry_actions: IMPORTANT: slug NE change PAS a l'edition (ref BR-023)

states.name: article_updated
states.description: Article mis a jour, redirection vers le detail.

transitions.condition: POST + ArticleForm.is_valid() + article.author == request.user (ref BR-034, BR-031)

error_handling.condition: Utilisateur authentifie mais non-auteur tente l'edition
rollback_actions: get_object_or_404 echoue (filtre author=request.user) → 404 Not Found (pas 403, ref BR-034)

workflows.mermaid_diagram:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> editing_form : GET /article/slug/edit
  editing_form --> saving_article : POST + form_valid + author==user
  saving_article --> article_updated : save() + tags + cache_delete
  article_updated --> [*] : redirect to article detail
  editing_form --> editing_form : POST + form_invalid
  note right of editing_form : 404 si non-auteur (BR-034)
  note right of saving_article : slug INCHANGE (BR-023)

workflows.name: Suppression d'Article
workflows.trigger: Auteur authentifie soumet le formulaire de suppression (POST /article/<slug>/delete, @login_required @require_POST)

states.name: article_exists
states.description: Article trouve et auteur verifie via get_object_or_404.

states.name: article_deleted
states.description: Article supprime. En cascade: tous les commentaires et liens favoris de cet article sont supprimes (ref BR-043).

error_handling.condition: Utilisateur authentifie non-auteur tente la suppression
rollback_actions: get_object_or_404(Article, slug=slug, author=request.user) echoue → 404 Not Found (pas 403, ref BR-035)

workflows.mermaid_diagram:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> article_exists
  article_exists --> article_deleted : POST + author==user (BR-035)
  article_deleted --> [*] : redirect to home
  note right of article_exists : 404 si non-auteur (BR-035)
  note right of article_deleted : cascade: all comments deleted (BR-043)

workflows.name: Toggle Favori Article (Favorite/Unfavorite)

states.name: not_favorited
states.description: L'article n'est pas en favori pour l'utilisateur courant.

states.name: favorited
states.description: L'article est dejà en favori pour l'utilisateur courant.

states.name: favorite_toggled
states.description: Etat de favori inverse. Compteur num_favorites recalcule via re-annotation. Reponse HTMX ou redirect.

workflows.mermaid_diagram:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> not_favorited
  [*] --> favorited
  not_favorited --> favorite_toggled : favorites.add(user)
  favorited --> favorite_toggled : favorites.remove(user)
  favorite_toggled --> [*] : HTMX partial favorite_button | redirect to detail
  note right of favorite_toggled : re-annotate with_favorites() (BR-025)
  note right of favorite_toggled : auteur peut se mettre en favori (pas de restriction)

workflows.name: Creation de Commentaire
workflows.trigger: Utilisateur authentifie soumet le formulaire de commentaire (POST /article/<slug>/comments/, @login_required @require_POST)

states.name: body_received
states.description: Corps du commentaire recu et trimme (strip). Article identifie par slug.

states.name: comment_created
states.description: Commentaire cree en base. L'auteur est l'utilisateur courant.

states.name: comment_skipped
states.description: Corps vide ou espaces seuls — aucun commentaire cree, aucune erreur affichee (comportement silencieux, ref BR-039).

states.name: response_sent
states.description: Reponse HTMX (liste de commentaires partielle) ou redirection vers le detail envoyee.

transitions.condition: body.strip() == '' — corps vide ou espaces (ref BR-039) — skip silencieux

workflows.mermaid_diagram:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> body_received
  body_received --> comment_created : body.strip() != empty (BR-039)
  body_received --> comment_skipped : body.strip() == empty (silent)
  comment_created --> response_sent : HTMX: partial comment_list
  comment_created --> response_sent : non-HTMX: redirect to detail
  comment_skipped --> response_sent : HTMX: partial comment_list
  comment_skipped --> response_sent : non-HTMX: redirect to detail
  response_sent --> [*]

workflows.name: Suppression de Commentaire
workflows.trigger: Utilisateur authentifie (auteur du commentaire OU auteur de l'article) soumet la suppression (POST /article/<slug>/comments/<id>/delete, @login_required @require_POST)

states.name: authorization_check
states.description: Article et commentaire recuperes, verification des droits en cours (ref BR-041, BR-044).

states.name: authorized
states.description: Utilisateur autorise: il est l'auteur du commentaire OU l'auteur de l'article (droit de moderation).

states.name: forbidden
states.description: Tentative de suppression par un utilisateur non autorise.

states.name: comment_deleted
states.description: Commentaire supprime de la base.

states.name: response_sent
states.description: Reponse HTMX (liste de commentaires partielle) ou redirection vers le detail envoyee.

transitions.condition: comment.author == request.user OU article.author == request.user (ref BR-041)
Ni auteur du commentaire ni auteur de l'article (ref BR-041)

error_handling.condition: comment_id valide mais n'appartient pas a l'article du slug (ref BR-044)
rollback_actions: get_object_or_404(Comment, id=comment_id, article=article) echoue → 404 Not Found

workflows.mermaid_diagram:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> authorization_check
  authorization_check --> authorized : comment.author==user OR article.author==user (BR-041)
  authorization_check --> forbidden : aucun des deux roles
  forbidden --> [*] : HTTP 403 Forbidden
  authorized --> comment_deleted : comment.delete()
  comment_deleted --> response_sent : HTMX: partial comment_list
  comment_deleted --> response_sent : non-HTMX: redirect to detail
  response_sent --> [*]
  note right of authorization_check : 404 si comment_id hors article (BR-044)
